---
title: "Great Big Beautiful Life by Emily Henry - Review"
---

This is the fifth Emily Henry book I've read, and while I like her books, they do get quite repetitive. It is always a man and a woman who aren't supposed to be together and then end up falling in love. What sets this one apart from the others is there is more of a story apart from the "slow burn" romance, since the main characters are authors writing a biography about a woman from a famous family. It was fun to hear her story, but I found it a bit confusing to keep up with the different stories and timelines. The ending had a plot twist that I didn't really see coming, but it was also a bit predictable. Overall this was fun to read, but nothing too special.
